name: Cat Fest Lamb Meat Sticks For Cats 45g
description: Description Delicate sausages made from selected lamb meat will irritate even the most fastidious cat. Ingredients: lamb meat, plant products, minerals. Analytical Components: crude protein 28%, fats 6.0%, crude fiber 0.1%, moisture 25%; energy value – 166 kcal. Usage: Serve as a treat during the day. Adjust the amount according to your pet’s needs and condition. Do not overdo it.
